overall.description: A first-person walk through a stormy downtown Los Santos at night in GTA V. The player navigates across wet multi-lane intersections toward a distinctive curved skyscraper with a large cyan billboard, passing city buses, cars, and phone booths while lightning illuminates the rain-soaked streets.

events.description: green and yellow transit bus passes through the intersection on the left
lightning strike flashes across the dark stormy sky

agents.ego_description: walking across the first intersection, navigating between vehicles on the wet asphalt

notable_agents.action: green and yellow city bus driving through the intersection
black SUV crossing the intersection ahead

entered.detail: tall black street lamp illuminating the wet pavement with yellow light
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky along the street
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the wet asphalt
traffic signal suspended over the intersection showing red

segments.scene_description: The segment begins on a wet sidewalk at night during a storm. The camera moves forward across a multi-lane intersection, passing a green and yellow transit bus on the left and a black SUV. Lightning briefly illuminates the sky as the player navigates the crosswalk toward the median.

scene_state.functional_zone: median island and wide avenue crossing

events.description: bright lightning strike illuminates the entire scene reflecting off wet surfaces
continue walking across the wide avenue toward the distinctive cyan-lit building

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide avenue from the median island toward the opposite sidewalk, approaching the tall building

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving past the median island on the left

entered.detail: concrete traffic island with red curb and a central palm tree
tall curved modern skyscraper with large illuminated cyan billboard featuring a figure

segments.scene_description: The player crosses the median island and continues across the wide wet avenue. A prominent curved skyscraper with a glowing cyan billboard dominates the view ahead. Lightning strikes illuminate the storm clouds as vehicles pass by on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with phone booths and neon signage

events.description: step onto the concrete sidewalk from the crosswalk, leaving the street
pass by illuminated phone booths on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the wet sidewalk, passing urban street furniture and approaching the next intersection

entered.detail: curved building facade with bright red neon signage and illuminated windows
pair of modern illuminated glass phone booths with teal and white coloring
red and blue postal boxes mounted on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Having crossed the avenue, the player walks along the downtown sidewalk. A building with prominent red neon signage stands on the right while illuminated phone booths and mailboxes line the left. The tall cyan-billboard building grows larger ahead as the player approaches the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection corner with traffic lights and parked vehicles

events.description: multiple lightning strikes illuminate the sky and reflect dramatically on the wet pavement
traffic light changes from red to green, signaling it is safe to cross
begin crossing the final intersection toward the main building entrance

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner for the traffic light to change, then crossing the street toward the tall building entrance

notable_agents.action: silver sports car waiting at the intersection corner
black SUV driving through the wet intersection

entered.detail: white regulatory traffic sign with black text mounted on a pole
tall metal pole with horizontal traffic light arms extending over the street

segments.scene_description: The player waits at the final intersection corner as lightning strikes overhead and cars navigate the wet roads. After the traffic light turns green, the player crosses toward the entrance of the tall curved building with the cyan billboard, which now dominates the foreground.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey across rain-slicked city intersections toward a towering, illuminated skyscraper. It begins on a wet sidewalk during a storm, moving across a multi-lane intersection past a transit bus and a black SUV as lightning flashes across the sky. As the camera crosses a median island and continues over the wide avenue, the view is dominated by a curved skyscraper with a glowing cyan billboard emerging through the storm clouds. The scene then shifts to a downtown sidewalk lined with red neon signage, illuminated phone booths, and mailboxes before reaching a final intersection. Finally, after waiting for the traffic light to change amidst overhead lightning strikes, the camera crosses the street to arrive directly at the entrance of the massive cyan-billboard building.
